theme_and_archetype.reasoning: This is a professional back-office platform for a licensed Bahamian Private Equity fund. It requires the authority and functional density of a Bloomberg terminal (Archetype 4) while maintaining the premium, trustworthy aesthetic of high finance. Deep charcoal, crisp white, navy, and gold ensure a premium institutional feel.

rules.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937] font-sans
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937] font-sans
rules.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937] font-sans

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 bg-[#252523] text-white flex flex-col h-screen sticky top-0 border-r border-[#333333]
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.padding_rules: p-6 md:p-8 for main page sections to ensure breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-sm (max 4px to 8px) for a sharp, institutional look. Avoid heavily rounded corners to keep it professional.

cards.style: Flat, rectangular. bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-sm shadow-sm
cards.header: border-b border-[#E5E7EB] px-5 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B3A6B] text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-[#122A50] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1B3A6B]/50
buttons.accent: bg-[#C9A84C] text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-[#A88C3F] transition-colors
buttons.disabled: bg-[#E5E7EB] text-[#9CA3AF] cursor-not-allowed opacity-50 border border-[#D1D5DB]

tables.header: text-xs uppercase bg-[#F8F9FA] text-[#6B7280] font-semibold border-b border-[#E5E7EB] tracking-wider

badges.low_risk: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wide inline-flex items-center justify-center
badges.medium_risk: bg-[#F59E0B]/10 text-[#F59E0B] border border-[#F59E0B]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wide inline-flex items-center justify-center
badges.high_risk: bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wide inline-flex items-center justify-center

forms.input: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#D1D5DB] rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[#1F2937] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1B3A6B] focus:border-[#1B3A6B] placeholder:text-[#9CA3AF]
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#374151] mb-1.5

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive rows, buttons, and links must have a clear hover state.
motion_and_interactions.disabled_actions: All action buttons MUST be disabled (opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed) until the 'Review Scorecard' step is completed in the Compliance UI.

images.description: Aerial view of Bahamas ocean. Must be heavily overlaid (bg-black/70) to ensure high-end premium aesthetic and text readability on the login screen.
Professional corporate headshot for sample investor profile in the queue.
Professional corporate headshot for sample investor profile in the queue.
Professional corporate headshot for sample investor profile in the queue.

login_page.layout: Centered floating card over the Bahamas aerial background with a dark overlay (bg-[#252523]/80). The card itself should be pure white (#FFFFFF).
login_page.content: Email, Password, Role Selector (Compliance/Risk/Fund Manager) as a dropdown, Login button.

executive_dashboard.layout: Grid of KPI cards at the top (gap-4 or gap-6), followed by a 2-column bento layout or stacked full-width tables for Investor Queue and Deal Pipeline.
executive_dashboard.kpi_cards: Total Investors, Pending KYC Reviews, Deals in Pipeline, Flagged Items. Use monospaced font for the main digits.

investor_queue.features: Risk Rating badges (Low/Medium/High). Columns for Name, Type, KYC Status, Risk, Actions.

compliance_scoring.layout: Detailed view/modal for a specific investor.
compliance_scoring.features: Scorecard interface with a checklist. Main action button ('Approve KYC') is explicitly disabled until all scorecard items are marked reviewed.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent.frameworks: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI primitives. Fast-loading static dashboard.
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="sidebar-nav-deals"`, `data-testid="approve-kyc-button"`).
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios. Focus states must use `focus:ring-[#1B3A6B]`.
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.fonts_installation: Add Google Fonts for 'Chivo' (headings) and 'JetBrains Mono' (data numbers). Map them in tailwind.config.js under `fontFamily: { sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'], heading: ['Chivo', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace'] }`.
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.component_libraries: Install relevant shadcn/ui components: card, button, input, badge, table, select/dropdown-menu. Ensure the UI feels like a dense Bloomberg terminal, not a fluffy consumer app.
